flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Lamar State College-Port Arthur fell 34% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3k → 1.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 34% at Lamar State College-Port Arthur vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.5k vs 2.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Lamar State College-Port Arthur fell 32% between 2006 and 2009 (18.4% → 12.5%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Lamar State College-Port Arthur rose 26% between 2017 and 2020 ($10.5k → $13.2k).
